description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:3.2 Docker image and caches the vendor directory. Add a pages job that runs only on the default branch, executes apt-get update -yqqq, apt-get install -y nodejs, bundle install --path vendor, and bundle exec middleman build, and publishes the public/ folder as a pages artifact. Add a test job that runs on any non‑default branch, runs the same four commands, but does not produce artifacts. Both jobs run in the default stage (test) and share the vendor cache.
